final:
module RefModule(input clk,

        input rst,

        input RegWr,

        input [0:4] Rw,

        input [0:31] Data_in,

        input [0:4] Rs,

        output [0:31] BusA,

        input [0:4] Rt,

     output [0:31] BusB);reg [0:31] 	   unused_regfile [0:31];




   assign BusA = unused_regfile[Rs];


   assign BusB = unused_regfile[Rt];




   integer 	   i;


   always @(posedge clk or negedge rst) begin

      if (~rst) begin

	 for (i = 0; i < 32; i = i + 1) begin

	    unused_regfile[i] <= 0;


	 end

      end else begin

	 if (RegWr) unused_regfile[Rw] <= Data_in;
		

	       end 

   end 

   endmodule
